proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have higher `objective_response` than patients without `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.
Patients with `treatment_7plus3` have higher `objective_response` than patients without `treatment_7plus3`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 21.96% with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine (n=20020) vs 16.61% without it (n=29980); difference +0.0535.
Response was 18.89% with treatment_7plus3 (n=22580) vs 18.63% without it (n=27420); difference +0.0026.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive`=1, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with higher `objective_response`.
Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive`=0, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with lower `objective_response`.
The `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` response-rate advantage is larger in `unfit_for_intensive`=1 patients than in `unfit_for_intensive`=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Among unfit patients, response was 30.81% with venetoclax/azacitidine (n=8013) vs 16.30% without it (n=12043); difference +0.1451.
Among fit patients, response was 16.05% with venetoclax/azacitidine (n=12007) vs 16.81% without it (n=17937); difference -0.0077.
The treatment difference was +0.1451 in unfit patients and -0.0077 in fit patients; interaction difference-in-differences +0.1528.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `npm1_mutation`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 23.46% in NPM1-mutated patients (n=15014) vs 16.73% in NPM1-wildtype patients (n=34986); difference +0.0674.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 patients, `npm1_mutation`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response`.
The positive `npm1_mutation` response-rate difference is larger among `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 patients than among `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Among venetoclax/azacitidine-treated patients, response was 34.66% with NPM1 mutation (n=6025) vs 16.49% without NPM1 mutation (n=13995); difference +0.1816.
The NPM1 response difference was +0.1816 with venetoclax/azacitidine and -0.0092 without venetoclax/azacitidine; interaction difference-in-differences +0.1908.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with both `unfit_for_intensive`=1 and `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1, `npm1_mutation`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `npm1_mutation`=0.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test within unfit_for_intensive=1 and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1
analyses.result_summary: In unfit venetoclax/azacitidine-treated patients, response was 63.31% with NPM1 mutation (n=2401) vs 16.91% without NPM1 mutation (n=5612); difference +0.4640.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive`=1 and `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=0, `npm1_mutation`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `npm1_mutation`=0.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test within unfit_for_intensive=1 and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0
analyses.result_summary: In unfit patients not receiving venetoclax/azacitidine, response was 15.96% with NPM1 mutation (n=3585) vs 16.45% without NPM1 mutation (n=8458); difference -0.0049.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation`=1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `tp53_mutation`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.57% in TP53-mutated patients (n=4985) vs 18.99% in TP53-wildtype patients (n=45015); difference -0.0242.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `npm1_mutation` response-rate advantage is lower in `tp53_mutation`=1 patients than in `tp53_mutation`=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: NPM1 mutation was associated with +0.0750 response difference in TP53-wildtype disease and -0.0005 in TP53-mutated disease; difference-in-differences -0.0755.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` response-rate advantage is lower in `tp53_mutation`=1 patients than in `tp53_mutation`=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Venetoclax/azacitidine was associated with +0.0600 response difference in TP53-wildtype disease and -0.0036 in TP53-mutated disease; difference-in-differences -0.0636.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype`=1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `complex_karyotype`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.81% in complex-karyotype patients (n=7462) vs 19.09% in non-complex patients (n=42538); difference -0.0229.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `npm1_mutation` response-rate advantage is lower in `complex_karyotype`=1 patients than in `complex_karyotype`=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: NPM1 mutation was associated with +0.0819 response difference in non-complex karyotype disease and -0.0139 in complex karyotype disease; difference-in-differences -0.0958.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `ecog_ps` >= 1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `ecog_ps`=0.
Patients with `ecog_ps`=2 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `ecog_ps`=0.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test comparing ecog_ps>=1 vs ecog_ps=0
analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.39% with ECOG >=1 (n=32408) vs 23.10% with ECOG 0 (n=17592); difference -0.0670.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test comparing ecog_ps=2 vs ecog_ps=0
analyses.result_summary: Response was 12.91% with ECOG 2 (n=7437) vs 23.10% with ECOG 0 (n=17592); difference -0.1019.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `weight_loss_pct_6mo` >= 5 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `weight_loss_pct_6mo` < 5.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.43% with weight loss >=5% (n=17522) vs 20.00% with weight loss <5% (n=32478); difference -0.0358.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `albumin_g_dl` < 3.5 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `albumin_g_dl` >= 3.5.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 17.36% with albumin <3.5 g/dL (n=12140) vs 19.20% with albumin >=3.5 g/dL (n=37860); difference -0.0184.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `blast_pct_marrow` >= 70 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `blast_pct_marrow` < 70.
Patients with `wbc_k_per_ul` >= 50 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `wbc_k_per_ul` < 50.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.81% with marrow blasts >=70% (n=15315) vs 19.61% with blasts <70% (n=34685); difference -0.0279.
Response was 16.70% with WBC >=50 K/uL (n=3982) vs 18.93% with WBC <50 K/uL (n=46018); difference -0.0223.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `crp_mg_l` >= 10 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `crp_mg_l` < 10.
Patients with `nlr` >= 5 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `nlr` < 5.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.41% with CRP >=10 mg/L (n=8024) vs 19.20% with CRP <10 mg/L (n=41976); difference -0.0278.
Response was 18.29% with NLR >=5 (n=9009) vs 18.85% with NLR <5 (n=40991); difference -0.0056.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `flt3_itd`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `flt3_itd`=0.
Patients with `flt3_tkd`=1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `flt3_tkd`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 18.92% with FLT3-ITD (n=10000) vs 18.71% without FLT3-ITD (n=40000); difference +0.0021.
Response was 18.05% with FLT3-TKD (n=2815) vs 18.79% without FLT3-TKD (n=47185); difference -0.0075.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `idh1_mutation`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `idh1_mutation`=0.
Patients with `idh2_mutation`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `idh2_mutation`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 19.09% with IDH1 mutation (n=3624) vs 18.72% without IDH1 mutation (n=46376); difference +0.0037.
Response was 19.15% with IDH2 mutation (n=4679) vs 18.71% without IDH2 mutation (n=45321); difference +0.0044.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_itd`=1, `treatment_midostaurin`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `treatment_midostaurin`=0.
Among patients with `flt3_itd`=1, `treatment_gilteritinib`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `treatment_gilteritinib`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Among FLT3-ITD patients, response was 17.64% with midostaurin (n=1468) vs 19.14% without midostaurin (n=8532); difference -0.0150.
Among FLT3-ITD patients, response was 19.11% with gilteritinib (n=1491) vs 18.89% without gilteritinib (n=8509); difference +0.0023.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `idh1_mutation`=1, `treatment_ivosidenib`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `treatment_ivosidenib`=0.
Among patients with `idh2_mutation`=1, `treatment_enasidenib`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `treatment_enasidenib`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Among IDH1-mutated patients, response was 15.44% with ivosidenib (n=298) vs 19.42% without ivosidenib (n=3326); difference -0.0399.
Among IDH2-mutated patients, response was 19.49% with enasidenib (n=354) vs 19.12% without enasidenib (n=4325); difference +0.0037.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive`=1, `treatment_7plus3`=1 is associated with higher `objective_response` than `treatment_7plus3`=0.
The `treatment_7plus3` response-rate difference is lower in `unfit_for_intensive`=1 patients than in `unfit_for_intensive`=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Among unfit patients, response was 22.11% with 7+3 (n=9106) vs 22.09% without 7+3 (n=10950); difference +0.0002.
The 7+3 treatment difference was +0.0002 in unfit patients and +0.0039 in fit patients; difference-in-differences -0.0037.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `secondary_aml`=1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `secondary_aml`=0.
Patients with `sex_female`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `sex_female`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 18.81% with secondary AML (n=12301) vs 18.73% without secondary AML (n=37699); difference +0.0008, opposite the hypothesized direction.
Response was 18.91% in female patients (n=22371) vs 18.62% in non-female patients (n=27629); difference +0.0029.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_amplification`=1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `her2_amplification`=0.
Patients with `met_exon14_skipping`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `met_exon14_skipping`=0.
Patients with `ret_fusion`=1 have lower `objective_response` than patients with `ret_fusion`=0.
Patients with `ros1_fusion`=1 have higher `objective_response` than patients with `ros1_fusion`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 18.13% with HER2 amplification (n=1467) vs 18.77% without it (n=48533); difference -0.0064.
Response was 18.85% with MET exon 14 skipping (n=1501) vs 18.75% without it (n=48499); difference +0.0011.
Response was 18.66% with RET fusion (n=1018) vs 18.75% without it (n=48982); difference -0.0009.
Response was 19.44% with ROS1 fusion (n=468) vs 18.74% without it (n=49532); difference +0.0070.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, `npm1_mutation` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, `tp53_mutation` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, `complex_karyotype` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: objective_response ~ covariates + treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine:unfit_for_intensive
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x unfit_for_intensive was +0.1523.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for npm1_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for npm1_mutation was +0.0674.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for tp53_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for tp53_mutation was -0.0270.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for complex_karyotype
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for complex_karyotype was -0.0241.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, each one-step increase in `ecog_ps` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, each 1-SD increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, each 1-SD increase in `albumin_g_dl` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, each 1-SD increase in `blast_pct_marrow` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for demographics, AML features, labs, and treatments, each 1-SD increase in `crp_mg_l` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for ecog_ps
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for ecog_ps was -0.0523 per ECOG step.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for standardized weight_loss_pct_6mo
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for standardized weight_loss_pct_6mo was -0.0199 per SD.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for standardized albumin_g_dl
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for standardized albumin_g_dl was +0.0091 per SD.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for standardized blast_pct_marrow
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for standardized blast_pct_marrow was -0.0146 per SD.

analyses.code: robust linear probability model: adjusted coefficient for standardized crp_mg_l
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for standardized crp_mg_l was -0.0076 per SD.
